caveats: inputs.ai_replaceable_share: Fractions measure task replaceability, not realized layoffs or adoption speed.
inputs.ai_replaceable_share: Large residual wage bucket requires a bounded proxy judgment.
inputs.pi_dist: Commission schedules and fee-account repricing can pass savings through.
inputs.pi_moat: Licensing does not prevent carriers from going direct.
inputs.t50_years: Vendor survey captures expectations, not audited production use.
inputs.current_adoption_pct: Not a direct prevalence measure; distinction between experimentation and effective deployment is judgmental.
inputs.historical_analogs: No quantified historical adoption series selected.
inputs.owners_60plus_pct: This is not an observed owner-age statistic and should not be treated as one.
inputs.owners_60plus_pct.succession_shortage_documented: Avoids treating consolidation as proof of succession shortage.
inputs.active_consolidators: Counts named high-volume buyers, not every acquirer.
inputs.buy_mult: S4 includes all insurance-broker deals above $1M EBITDA and does not isolate the $1-10M retail P&C/benefits target band.
inputs.buy_mult: Use normalized EBITDA after contingent-commission, owner-dependency and retention diligence.
inputs.exit_mult: S4 includes all insurance-broker deals above $1M EBITDA and does not isolate the $1-10M retail P&C/benefits target band.
inputs.exit_mult: No multiple expansion is assumed between entry and exit.
inputs.pricing_structure: Commission percentages and account fee mix were not directly measured here.

q.rationale: The existing v3 distribution-retention × moat-retention judgment is reused as a bounded Stage 1 commercial-retention proxy.

leaves.rationale: Predeclared bounded demand/operator row for the inherited v3 terminal class; unknown classes remain missing.

e.rationale: Global eligible-union share; heterogeneous records use the predeclared wider/lower class-count row.

n.detail: margin 0.2357 (margins.json[524]: Damodaran Jan 2026: Insurance (General) EBITDA/Sales 23.57%); revenue/employee $256,440 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 524210); class <5: 91,066 firms, avg revenue/firm $323,793 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $76,318 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 20,081 firms, avg revenue/firm $929,879 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $219,173 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 5,672 firms, avg revenue/firm $2,313,385 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $545,265 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 2,689 firms, avg revenue/firm $8,126,954 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $1,915,523 -> IN $1-10M band; class 100-499: 547 firms, avg revenue/firm $40,097,678 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $9,451,023 -> IN $1-10M band; class 500+: 379 firms, avg revenue/firm $269,239,583 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $63,459,770 -> out of $1-10M band; n_band = 3,236

s5.rationale: Fixed transform of the disclosed v3 owner-age range into five-year qualifying control-transfer propensity.

a.rationale: Workflow evidence supports high automation of processing and admin tasks, but licensed advice, relationship selling and accountable risk judgment remain human work.

l.detail: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 524210 ($103,879,237,202) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 524210 ($207,109,590,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

rho.rationale: Fixed outcome-blind transform of the v3 t50 adoption estimate, widened by the declared bridge error.

source_review.summary: Mechanics, identity, model routing, digest binding, deterministic dataset injection, fresh finalization, fresh memo rendering, and arithmetic all pass. All five registered score-driving sources are accessible. They support the useful direction of the workflow, licensing, consolidation, and valuation evidence, while the selected adoption, automation, capture, ownership, target-specific multiple, and future-exit judgments remain disclosed estimates or broad proxies. Factor semantics are not reversed, and no terminal/capture or ownership/consolidation reuse is likely to change the thesis: the no-re-rating 8.0x entry/exit case sets M to zero and independently preserves the kill verdict. The record is therefore publishable with its fifteen authored caveats.
